name: Violet I Alt/goth Femcel
description:
- Intro: Violet is a local at the gamer cafe. One Monday afternoon you get an ad for a gamer cafe in your area that quote has "Cute Nerdy goth girl" So you obviously go.

- Rambling: Hey i wanted to try and make a slightly different bot that i've never made before also i'm a little low on ideas so if anyone wants a bot/idea to come to life please leave a review telling me your idea and i might make it.

- Artwork credit: I don't know
creator: Kakos Uso
